records.ety: [L. circumlocutio, fr. circumloqui, -locutus, to make use of circumlocution; circum + loqui to speak. See Loquacious.]

defs: The use of many words to express an idea that might be expressed by few; indirect or roundabout language; a periphrase.
quotes: the plain Billingsgate way of calling names . . . would save abundance of time lost by circumlocution.
